mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, account_no AS accountNo, user_name AS userName, balance, status, gmt_create AS gmtCreate, gmt_modified AS gmtModified FROM tb_account WHERE account_no = #{accountNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_transaction (tx_no, from_account_no, to_account_no, amount, tx_type, status, remark) VALUES (#{txNo}, #{fromAccountNo}, #{toAccountNo}, #{amount}, #{txType}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, account_no AS accountNo, user_name AS userName, balance, status, gmt_create AS gmtCreate, gmt_modified AS gmtModified FROM tb_account WHERE account_no = #{accountNo} FOR UPDATE
